commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the legacy doctor config migration to materialize inherited DM/group access-policy keys into existing named channel accounts when seeding `accounts.default`, with Mattermost and sibling-channel regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +161. Total +187 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main removes promoted root policy fields while Mattermost named accounts previously inherited those fields through account merge. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
